# Pull request

## What does this change?

A one-paragraph summary. If this touches the workflow JSON, describe which nodes you added, removed, or rewired.

## Why?

What problem does it solve? Link the issue if there is one.

## How was it tested?

- [ ] I imported the modified JSON into a clean n8n instance and the workflow opened without errors.
- [ ] I ran the workflow against pinned sample data and the output email looked correct.
- [ ] I verified no real credentials or PII are present in any modified file.
- [ ] I ran the manual review checklist in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) has an entry under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] No em dash characters were introduced in any file.

## Screenshots or execution traces (optional)

Attach screenshots of the n8n editor or an execution log (with PII redacted) if it makes the change easier to review.
